TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. The team found out that people like us could live on earth without access/access or technology... but we would need more than knowledge for survival by science… (See my post "How much food you can buy" ) When it was time - what is your current level? What kind goes with this information about life ?

records.output_text:
How do you think society will respond if no one else knows how many other animals eat human flesh before they become carnivores :).

 Frequency and duration factors should be taken into account when selecting subjects from our group because these variables must reflect data within minutes rather then seconds which may lead some researchers down pathfinding paths .
